title: gentianella campestris var. suecica
intro: Gentianella campestris var. suecica, also known as Mountain Gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is a low-growing, perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Gentianella campestris var. suecica is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to treat various health issues, including colds, coughs, and digestive issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
